info.title: RouteHub API
info.description: API documentation for RouteHub — fleet management, payments, documents, and inspections.

cookieAuth.name: sb-access-token
cookieAuth.description: Supabase session cookie (set automatically after login)

cronSecret.name: authorization
cronSecret.description: Bearer token matching CRON_SECRET env var (for scheduled jobs)

get.summary: List all service types
get.description: Returns all service types ordered by name. Cached for 5 minutes.

post.description: Admin only. Validates input with Zod schema.

put.description: Admin only. Requires id in the request body.

delete.description: Admin only. Pass id as query parameter.

post.summary: Save a planned route with stops
post.description: Creates a route record and its stops. When a service type and inspector are specified, updates company_services inspection dates and creates inspection_history records. Requires admin or dispatcher role.

200.description: Route saved with inspection dates updated

post.description: Accepts a list of locations and returns an optimized stop sequence. Uses OSRM real-road routing by default. Requires admin or dispatcher role.

200.description: Optimized route with stop order and metadata

get.summary: List bank transactions
get.description: Returns paginated bank transactions with optional filters for status, company, date range, and text search.

parameters.name: from
parameters.description: Start date for date range filter

parameters.name: to
parameters.description: End date for date range filter

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Free-text search across sender name, tax ID, purpose, and doc key

post.summary: Manually match or ignore a transaction
post.description: Admin-only action to manually match a transaction to a company or mark it as ignored. Creates an audit trail for matches.

400.description: Validation failed or missing companyId for match action

get.summary: List unmatched transactions with suggestions
get.description: Returns up to 100 unmatched bank transactions, each enriched with suggested company matches based on tax ID exact match or name similarity (bigram Jaccard index).

200.description: Array of unmatched transactions with suggested companies

get.summary: Get payment statistics
get.description: Returns aggregated payment statistics including totals, match rates, and amounts. Uses a DB-side RPC for performance with a client-side fallback.

parameters.name: from
parameters.description: Start date for date range filter

parameters.name: to
parameters.description: End date for date range filter

get.summary: Get contract terms grouped by tax ID
get.description: Fetches contract data from contract-related boards (active, one-time, paused, ended) using dynamic column discovery by name. Returns contracts keyed by tax ID, enriched with the earliest bank transaction date per tax ID. Response is cached for 5 minutes.

post.summary: Send an email notification to a user
post.description: Looks up the user's email by user_id, generates an email from the notification type/title/message, and sends it via Resend. Accepts either a user session cookie or an x-internal-secret header (for server-side callers like cron jobs).

data.description: Additional context passed to email template

400.description: Missing required fields (user_id, type, or title)

401.description: Authentication required (no session or internal secret)

post.summary: Submit a GPS location update for an inspector
post.description: Updates the inspector's current location, inserts a history record, and broadcasts the update via Ably. The caller must own the inspector_id or hold admin/dispatcher role.

get.summary: Get location history for an inspector
get.description: Returns chronologically ordered GPS location points for a given inspector. Defaults to the last 24 hours if no `since` parameter is provided.

parameters.name: inspector_id
parameters.description: The inspector whose history to retrieve

parameters.name: since
parameters.description: ISO 8601 timestamp to fetch records from (defaults to 24 hours ago)

200.description: Array of location points ordered by recorded_at ascending

get.summary: Get currently active inspectors with live locations
get.description: Returns inspectors who reported a location within the last 30 minutes, including their latest coordinates and today's active route progress.

200.description: Array of active inspectors with location and route data

get.summary: List inspectors
get.description: Returns all inspectors ordered by name. Optionally filter by status. Requires authentication.

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Filter by status (omit or "all" to return every status)

post.description: Creates a new inspector record. Admin only.

409.description: Inspector with this email already exists

put.description: Updates an existing inspector by ID. Admin only.

delete.description: Permanently deletes an inspector by ID. Admin only.

get.summary: System health check
get.description: Runs parallel checks against Supabase (DB ping, table counts, auth latency, RLS query, storage) and returns timed results with an overall status. Results are persisted to health_check_logs.

get.summary: List document templates for a board

parameters.name: boardId
parameters.description: Board ID to fetch templates for (also returns global templates with null board_id)

boardId.description: Board to associate template with (null for global)

201.description: Template created successfully (may include warning about tag parsing)

400.description: Missing file/name or unsupported file type

get.summary: Get a single document template by ID

tag_mapping.description: Mapping of template tags to column IDs or computed fields

delete.summary: Delete a document template and its storage file

post.summary: Send a generated document via email

documentId.description: ID of the generated document to send

post.summary: Generate a document from a template and board item data

templateId.description: ID of the document template to use

itemId.description: ID of the board item to pull data from

boardId.description: ID of the board (used to fetch columns)

404.description: Template or board item not found

get.summary: Download a generated document as a binary file
Find companies with duplicate GPS coordinates
get.description: Scans companies for duplicate lat/lng pairs (6 decimal precision). Returns the top 10 duplicate coordinate groups. Admin only.

post.summary: Submit a new data collection entry
post.description: Creates a board item in all data_collection boards with company info, GPS coordinates, and service details. Used by field inspectors.

get.summary: Get recent data collection entries for the current user
get.description: Returns the 20 most recent board items created by the authenticated user in data_collection boards.

get.summary: Ping all Supabase instances to prevent cold starts
get.description: Pings team1, team2, and team3 Supabase instances in parallel to keep connections warm. Reports per-instance latency and overall health status. Runs every 4 minutes via Vercel Cron.

parameters.name: secret
parameters.description: Alternative to Authorization header for manual testing

get.summary: Send contract expiry alert notifications
get.description: Checks all board items in the "კომპანიები" board for contracts hitting expiry thresholds (30, 14, 7, 0 days). Creates in-app notifications for admin/dispatcher users and sends a summary email. Runs daily via Vercel Cron.

get.summary: Reconcile unmatched bank transactions
get.description: Re-runs the matching algorithm on all unmatched bank transactions. Scheduled nightly at 02:00 via Vercel Cron to catch newly added companies or updated tax IDs.

parameters.name: secret
parameters.description: Alternative to Authorization header for manual testing

200.description: Reconciliation completed (or skipped if BOG not configured)

get.summary: Poll today's bank transactions from BOG
get.description: Fetches today's transactions from the Bank of Georgia API and runs auto-matching against known companies by tax ID. Scheduled every 30 minutes during business hours via Vercel Cron.

parameters.name: secret
parameters.description: Alternative to Authorization header for manual testing

200.description: Poll completed (or skipped if BOG not configured)

get.summary: Backfill historical bank transactions from BOG
get.description: Fetches historical transactions from the Bank of Georgia API for a given date range and ingests them into bank_transactions. Manual trigger only.

parameters.name: secret
parameters.description: Alternative to Authorization header for manual testing

200.description: Backfill completed (or skipped if BOG not configured)

get.summary: List company services with optional filters
get.description: Returns company services joined with company and service_type data, ordered by next_inspection_date ascending. Supports filtering by inspector, service type, and status.

200.description: Array of company service objects with joined company and service_type

post.summary: Save or update services for a company
post.description: Syncs the full list of services for a company. Inserts new services, updates existing ones, and deletes any that are no longer in the list. Requires admin or dispatcher role.

get.summary: List check-ins with optional filters
get.description: Returns check-ins with joined inspector, company, and location names. Officers see only their own; admins/dispatchers see all.

parameters.name: active
parameters.description: If "true", return only check-ins without a checkout

post.description: Records an inspector arriving at a company location. Enforces a 100m radius geofence when the location has GPS coordinates. Prevents double check-ins. Auto-populates location coords if missing. Syncs to checkins boards.

403.description: Cannot check in as another inspector

409.description: Inspector already has an active check-in

422.description: Inspector is outside the allowed geofence radius

patch.description: Closes an active check-in by recording checkout coordinates and computing duration. Calculates effective minutes based on GPS ping radius compliance. Syncs checkout to checkins boards.

400.description: Validation failed or already checked out

post.summary: Submit a GPS ping during an active check-in
post.description: Records the inspector's current position while checked in. Computes distance from the reference location (company location or original check-in coords) and flags whether the inspector is within the 100m geofence. Violation counts are aggregated at checkout.

distance.description: Distance in meters from reference location

400.description: Validation failed or check-in already closed

post.summary: Chat with the RouteHub AI assistant
post.description: Streams an AI-powered conversation using Claude. The assistant has tools to query companies, boards, bank transactions, inspectors, and workspaces. Requires admin or dispatcher role.

get.summary: List all published announcements

200.description: Array of published announcements ordered by creation date descending

post.summary: Create a new announcement and notify all active users

is_published.description: If true, in-app notifications and emails are sent to all active users

get.summary: Get a single announcement by ID

post.summary: Mark an announcement as read by the current user

200.description: Announcement marked as read (upsert on announcement_id + user_id)

get.summary: List all users with roles
get.description: Returns all users ordered by creation date, each merged with their role from user_roles.

200.description: Array of users with their assigned roles

post.description: Creates a user in Supabase Auth (auto-confirmed), inserts a profile in the users table, and optionally assigns a role.

409.description: User with this email already exists

put.description: Updates user fields (full_name, phone, is_active) by user ID.

post.summary: Assign or update a user's role
post.description: Upserts a role for a given user. If the user already has a role, it is updated; otherwise a new role assignment is created.

200.description: The created or updated role assignment
